positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a majestic fox leaping through a stylized woodland landscape. The fox is rendered in clean, strong black silhouettes with sharp edges, contrasted against a vibrant, gradient background of deep indigo, emerald green, and warm ochre. The composition is centrally focused, featuring the fox mid-leap with dynamic lines. Behind the fox, include stylized, abstract elements like crescent moons, geometric constellations, and stylized mountain peaks that form a subtle pattern. The overall style should be modern graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing negative space and high contrast. Flat design principles, clean lines, vector art look, cinematic lighting, studio quality, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, brand, trademark, copyrighted, character, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, low quality, muted colors, messy, photorealistic, realistic drawing
